title: Furniture Resources (T&C2)
description:
Required Resource Pack for the Tables & Chairs 2 datapack.

Future: there will be a helper template so that you can add your own tables and chairs!
body:
Resource Pack for the Tables & Chairs 2 Datapack, which is required.  

Most if not all of these models were made by Axel // Chuckchuk!

Assets will update to fit the appearance of your game because this resource pack doesn’t actually feature any of its own textures. It just has models that inherit textures from the resource packs below!

Future: there will be a helper template so that you can add your own tables and chair models!
